allOf.comment: Target volume to dispense in mL
Total number of dispense cycles completed
At least one E-Stop button is pressed
ID of the station that triggered the E-Stop (0 = none)
All configured stations are functioning properly
Emergency stop circuit is bypassed (dangerous condition)
Reset the E-Stop system after clearing condition
System requires reset after E-Stop activation
Last measured response time in milliseconds
Safety relay contacts are functioning properly
Station 1 E-Stop is not activated and functioning
Station 2 E-Stop is not activated and functioning
Station 3 E-Stop is not activated and functioning
Station 4 E-Stop is not activated and functioning
Perform a function test of the E-Stop system
Total number of E-Stop stations in the system
All active conditions are satisfied without bypass
One or more conditions are bypassed
Last measured chain response time in milliseconds
Total number of chain evaluations performed
Error condition present in the chain
Chain is locked out and cannot be satisfied
Reset the interlock chain after violation
Overall safety chain is satisfied (all conditions met or bypassed)
Total number of times chain was violated
Name of the condition that was last violated
TRUE when actively preventing an action
TRUE when interlock conditions not satisfied
Duration of last break in seconds
Total number of mixing cycles completed
Maximum bandwidth per port in Mbps
Port status text (e.g., "All Up", "1 Down", "2 Down")
Total number of ports on switch
TRUE when all permissive conditions satisfied
Error deadband (no action within this range)
TRUE = output decreases as PV increases
Error code if HasError is TRUE
Physical key switch in ON position
Current load on UPS in percent (0-100)
Low battery warning threshold in percent
UPS is running on battery power
Runtime remaining on battery in minutes
Total number of battery charge/discharge cycles
Total runtime on battery power in hours
Label of button to release all solenoids
Label of indicator Displaying Centered Status
Label of Button to Close or DeEnergize valve
Label of indicator displaying Closed status
Valve is transitioning to closed position
Label of Button to Open or Energize valve
Label of indicator displaying Opened status
Valve is transitioning to open position
Number of images saved to disk
Mover is busy executing a command
ID of current mover at trigger
Name of current mover at trigger
Mover is present at trigger position
Number of events pending in queue
Number of movers registered to this trigger
ID of current mover at station
Name of current mover at station
Number of movers enroute to station
System is busy executing a task
Current end position of zone in mm
Number of movers currently in the zone
Name of sorted mover at specified position
Current start position of zone in mm
bit 2 - OpModeDWord - loop mode for two speed axes
bit 7 - OpModeDWord - axis is parameterized as modulo axis
bit 8 - OpModeDWord - axis is a simulation axis - available from 2.11 R2 B2033 - 2011-05-31 KSt
bit 12 - OpModeDWord - TargetPositionMonitoring for Stop and Halt commands - available from 2.11 R3 - 2011-12-09 KSt
StateDWord bit 20 - operational and position control active
PLC cycle counter when this data set updated
motion state in the PLCopen state diagram
NC cycle counter incremented after NC task updated NcToPlc data structures
StateDWord bit 17 - new target position commanded during move
axis operation mode feedback from NcToPlc
StateDWord bit 27 - forward soft travel limit exceeded
StateDWord bit 26 - reverse soft travel limit exceeded
task cycle time of the task which calls the status function
Task-Index of the task that updated this data set

allOf.description: Execute the request for a different ADS port

domain.description: Domain name of the authentication extension

anyOf.description: Parameters that are forwarded to the authentication extension's AddUser function. Notice that the userName without the domain is forwarded automatically.

settings.description: Changes to the USERGROUPUSERS entry of the user

userName.description: Name of the user without domain prefix

AUTOMAP.description: Automatically obtain symbol information such as options and schema from the domain.

CHECKCOMPLEXITY.description: Do not add symbol, check complexity of added symbol instead

anyOf.description: Changes to the USERGROUPUSERS entry of the current user.

allOf.description: Parameters that are forwarded to the authentication extension's ChangePassword function.
Calling this method without writeValue will read the current settings.

fileName.description: Name of the file to delete.

anyOf.description: User name. The authentication domain can be specified by using 'Domain::UserName'. If no domain is specified all users with the given name will be logged out.

clientCertificate.description: Thumbprint of the used client certificate

mergeSettings.description: Merge settings from the symbol configuration into the schema.

authExtension.description: Shows if extension can be used for user management.

configVersion.description: The version of the extension's configuration.

debuggerAttached.description: Indicates whether a debugger is or will be attached to the extension.

friendlyName.description: A more readable name version of the extension name.

guid.description: The globally unique identifier associated with the extension.

licensed.description: Indicate the extension is license status.

packageVersion.description: The version of the NuGet package that contains the extension.

remote.description: Shows if the domain refers to a remote server.

required.description: Shows if the extension is considered to be required.

state.description: Shows the current state of the extension.

thirdParty.description: Indicate the extension is a customer extension.

updated.description: Shows last update time of the config.

visibility.description: Indicates under which circumstances the extension configuration should be visible.

hash.description: The md5 hash of the file

hashes.description: If true, the hash of each file is returned.

path.description: The path to list files from.

recursive.description: If true, the entire directory tree is returned.

items.description: List of all users and their permissions.
List of all users and their permissions.

SCHEMA.description: The SessionId of the logged in user.

domain.description: Domain name of the authentication extension

userName.description: Name of the user without domain prefix

disableRecording.description: Disables the recording of one or all historize symbols depending if 'symbolName' is set.

symbolName.description: Delete database entries of symbol. If 'symbolName' is not set, all entries in the database will be deleted.

axesData.description: Array with sub-array for each symbol.

error.description: Error code associated with the data point.

flags.description: Recording state flags indicating when data recording started or stopped.

displayWidth.description: Display width of the TrendLineChart in pixels.

analyticsData.description: Array with analytics data for each symbol.

average.description: The average value of all data points in the requested time range.

maximum.description: The maximum value of all data points in the requested time range.

minimum.description: The minimum value of all data points in the requested time range.

axesData.description: Array with sub-array for each symbol.

error.description: Error code associated with the data point.

flags.description: Recording state flags indicating when data recording started or stopped.

analyticsType.description: Specifies which analytics calculations to perform on the retrieved data.

yAxes.description: Start and end time for TrendLineChart.

enabled.description: Indicates if the user can be used or not.

password.description: Password of the user. Only a hash will be stored.

newUserName.description: The new name of the user.

checkSum.description: Checksum of the file as MD5 hexadecimal-string.

domain.description: Upload extension dll to remote filesystem.
